What is Futurus and how does it work?: What is Futurus and how does it work?
Futurus is a micro share trading and pre: Futurus is a micro share trading and prediction platform where users buy “Yes” or “No” shares on real-world events. When the event outcome is declared, users holding the correct shares receive profit based on the market pool.

How can I participate in a prediction ev: How can I participate in a prediction event?
Simply browse active events, select your: Simply browse active events, select your preferred option (Yes or No), and purchase shares based on your confidence. Once the event ends, results are automatically processed and winnings are distributed.
Can I trade or sell my shares before an: Can I trade or sell my shares before an event ends?
Depending on the event type, some shares: Depending on the event type, some shares can be sold before the event closes. This allows you to minimize risk or lock in profit before results are announced.
How are winnings calculated on Futurus?: How are winnings calculated on Futurus?
Winnings are based on the total market p: Winnings are based on the total market pool for that event. If your prediction is correct, you receive a share of the pool proportional to your purchased amount.
